summary: Phase 3 Community Features Testing Complete. Backend: 29/29 tests passed. Frontend: All Phase 3 features verified via Playwright. One critical bug found: photo serving endpoint requires auth but is used as img src (photos don't render). All other features working correctly.

critical.issue: Endpoint named 'serve_photo_public' but has `Depends(get_current_user)` - requires JWT auth. Used in frontend as which cannot send auth headers. Photos return 403 for browser img tags. Fix: remove `current_user: dict = Depends(get_current_user)` dependency from this endpoint.

ui_bugs.issue: Photos uploaded to user profile don't render in the browser - show alt text only. Root cause: /api/photos/{photo_id} requires auth but can't send Bearer tokens. Admin profile shows 'Profile pho' alt text instead of actual photo.

integration_issues.issue: Photos return 403 without auth. Backend fix needed (remove auth from serve_photo_public endpoint).

gallery_settings_btn_owner_only.details: gallery-settings-btn visible on own profile, NOT visible on other user's profile

gallery_settings_panel.details: gallery-settings-panel shows with gallery-public-btn and gallery-protected-btn after clicking settings btn

save_gallery_settings.details: save-gallery-settings-btn saves privacy. 'Nastavení galerie uloženo' toast confirmed. 'Chráněno heslem' badge appears on gallery heading

protected_gallery_locked_panel.details: gallery-locked panel shows for other users on protected gallery. gallery-unlock-input and gallery-unlock-btn present

gallery_unlock_btn.details: Correct password (Transfortrans) unlocks gallery. 'Galerie odemčena' toast shown. gallery-locked panel disappears

tag_photo_button.details: tag-photo-{id} button visible on hover for owner (uses opacity-0 group-hover:opacity-100 CSS)

tag_search_panel.details: tag-search-panel appears after clicking tag button. Search input functional

nearby_page.details: nearby-page element found. 'Členové komunity v okolí: Praha' section visible with 6 nearby-user-* cards. Each card is a link to /users/{id}

nearby_users_api.details: GET /api/users/nearby?location=Praha returns 8 users (confirmed via backend test). Response has id, username fields. Excludes current user

news_share_story_btn.details: 'Sdílet příběh' button appears for authenticated regular user ONLY on zkusenosti tab. Hidden on 'all' tab. Admin sees 'Nová aktualita' on all tabs

news_video_url_field.details: news-video-input (URL videa field) present in both admin and regular user create forms

community_story_badge.details: 'Osobní příběh' badge visible on community stories by regular users. 'Video' badge also shows for stories with video_url

admin_can_create_any_category.details: Admin form shows 'Kategorie' selector. Backend test confirmed admin can POST to world/local/tips/events categories

regular_user_blocked_non_zkusenosti.details: Backend returns 403 for regular user attempting to create world/local categories. Frontend hides category selector for non-admin users

community_story_is_community_story_true.details: Regular user zkusenosti post has is_community_story=True. Admin zkusenosti post has is_community_story=False

action_items: CRITICAL: Fix /api/photos/{photo_id} - remove `Depends(get_current_user)` from `serve_photo_public` endpoint in server.py (line 1784). Photos are used as and cannot carry Bearer tokens. The endpoint is named 'public' but has auth requirement.

MINOR: fetchGalleryInfo in UserProfilePage.js uses `isSelf` closure variable - during auth context initialization it may be false, causing gallery to briefly appear locked for owner. Consider passing isSelf as parameter or await auth context.
critical_code_review_comments: serve_photo_public endpoint (line 1783-1790 server.py) has `Depends(get_current_user)` which blocks browser img tag rendering. This is the most critical bug.

UserProfilePage.js: fetchGalleryInfo closure captures `isSelf` at time of useEffect registration, not at call time. If auth loads after component mount, isSelf may be stale (false). Fix by including `isSelf` in useEffect dependency or refactor.
DialogContent missing aria-describedby in NewsPage.js and UserProfilePage.js - accessibility warning (minor).
server.py is ~1910 lines - approaching size limit for maintainability. Consider splitting into separate route files.

success_rate.frontend: 93% (14/15 - photo rendering is broken due to backend auth issue)

seed_data_creation: Created and deleted backend test data (community stories with TEST_ prefix). Uploaded and deleted 1 test photo (3a840a3a-781e-4f0e-a143-2d6b40dc2964). Admin gallery reset to public after testing.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 community features mostly working. Critical bug: /api/photos/{photo_id} endpoint requires auth, photos won't render in browser (403). Fix: remove Depends(get_current_user) from serve_photo_public. After fix, verify photo gallery renders actual images. All other Phase 3 features verified: gallery privacy settings, gallery locking/unlocking, photo tagging, nearby users (6 cards for Praha), community stories (is_community_story:true, Osobní příběh badge), news category restrictions.

rca_of_issue.bug: Photo gallery images don't render (403 Forbidden)
rca_of_issue.root_cause: GET /api/photos/{photo_id} endpoint in server.py line 1784 has `current_user: dict = Depends(get_current_user)` dependency. When React frontend uses this URL in , the browser makes a plain HTTP GET request without Authorization headers. FastAPI returns 403 because JWT token is missing.
rca_of_issue.reproduction: 1. Upload any photo to a user profile. 2. Navigate to that profile. 3. Photo shows alt text instead of image. 4. Browser console shows 403 error for /api/photos/ URL.
rca_of_issue.mitigation: Remove `current_user: dict = Depends(get_current_user)` from serve_photo_public function. Photos are stored in MongoDB by photo ID, privacy is enforced at the /users/{id}/photos endpoint level, not at the individual photo serving level.
